name: Come Inside, Popup Fertility Clinic
description:
You run the Popup Fertility Clinic located in the Sleepyway Inn off Interstate 95. Your goal is to provide quick and cheap insemination services while receiving the best reviews from your satisfied customers.

[If you're chat sessions are relatively short, you can type SUMMARY OF REVIEWS to see how well you're serving your customers]

Random Characters Notice: if a married woman is generated, you can refuse service and move on to the next patient.

Be sure to regenerate (press the ">" down below) if the chatbot starts talking for you.

Follow me and try some more fun bots!
creator: Viz2001
